mapper.delete: delete from ST_STBPRP_B_STCD where STCD = #{STCD} AND TYPE = #{TYPE}
mapper.update:
UPDATE "SZ_WATER"."ST_STBPRP_B_STCD" t JOIN "SZ_WATER"."ST_STBPRP_B_STCDONE" tmp ON t.stcd = tmp.stcd AND t.ZSTCD = tmp.ZSTCD AND t.TYPE = tmp.TYPE AND t.MTYPE = tmp.MTYPE AND t.tab = tmp.tab SET t.upz = tmp.upz,t.dwz=tmp.dwz,t.ztm=tmp.ztm,t.zd=tmp.zd
and tmp.ZTM >= to_date(#{stime},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO "SZ_WATER"."ST_RIVER_BX_R" (STCD, TM, Z) SELECT STCD, TM, Z FROM "SZ_WATER"."BINHUSW"
TM > (SELECT MAX(TM) FROM "SZ_WATER"."ST_RIVER_BX_R" where tm>(SYSDATE - 24) and STCD=#{stcd})

INSERT INTO "SZ_WATER"."ST_PPTN_BX_R" (STCD, TM, DRP) SELECT STCD, TM, DRP FROM "SZ_WATER"."BINHUDRP"
TM > (SELECT MAX(TM) FROM "SZ_WATER"."ST_PPTN_BX_R" where tm>(SYSDATE - 24) and STCD=#{stcd})
